title: Trump on dignified transfer of soldiers
shortDescription: President Donald Trump is set to attend the dignified transfer of soldiers killed in the Iran war.

title: Fetterman criticizes Trump on 2020 election: 'That's been settled'
shortDescription: U.S. Sen. John Fetterman criticized President Donald Trump after Trump's comments about alleged election interference during a primetime address.

title: Watch: Trump is headed to Georgia today, plus the AZ primary results
shortDescription: President Trump's influence prevailed in the Arizona primary. Trump is headed to Georgia today. Plus, Trump is threatening civilian targets in Iran.

title: Trump threatens to escalate retaliatory strikes on Iran, bomb bridges
shortDescription: Donald Trump threatened to bomb Iran's bridges and power plants, in response to attacks on ships in the Strait of Hormuz.

title: Trump-backed GOP candidates win in Arizona
shortDescription: Rep. Andy Biggs secured the GOP nomination for governor, setting up a November showdown with Democratic Gov. Katie Hobbs.

title: Trump is coming to Atlanta today. Here's how to watch school visit
shortDescription: President Trump is speaking at Wheeler High School in Marietta today to discuss Trump Accounts. You can watch it live.

title: Arizona election results: Latest on primary races for House, governor
shortDescription: Arizona's November ballot takes shape.

title: Arizona GOP nominates Biggs, other MAGA stalwarts: 5 primary takeaways
shortDescription: Arizona is one of the most competitive battlegrounds where Trump-aligned candidates will be heavily scrutinized.

title: House passes short-term funding bill to avert government shutdown
shortDescription: The vote sends the stopgap, known as a continuing ​resolution, to the ​Senate.

title: Pete Hegseth appears on Capitol Hill amid Iran war funding push
shortDescription: Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth told senators the Iran war has cost about $37.5 billion so far as the Pentagon seeks billions more in emergency funding from Congress.

title: California DMV software raises voter-roll questions after NJ error
shortDescription: New Jersey blamed an IDEMIA DMV software error; California uses the vendor, prompting questions.

title: U.S. Attorney appointee fired by Trump challenges termination in suit
shortDescription: Roger Rogoff filed a lawsuit Tuesday in federal court against President Trump for his 'unlawful firing' from the position of U.S. Attorney.

title: Trump-backed Biggs, Feely win GOP primaries: Arizona election results
shortDescription: Republicans backed by President Donald Trump won handily in Arizona, one of the nation's most competitive political battleground states.

title: Trump's approval ratings remain near record lows, new poll shows
shortDescription: President Trump’s polling woes continue as his approval rating struggled again in a new Economist/YouGov poll.

title: Trump admin pauses $1 billion in Medicaid payments to California, Minnesota
shortDescription: The Trump administration is pausing $1 billion in Medicaid payments to California and Minnesota over "suspected fraud and noncompliance."

title: What does Cobb County think of upcoming Trump visit? It's mixed reviews
shortDescription: President Trump will be visiting a Marietta, Georgia high school on Wednesday to talk about Trump Accounts. Community reacted with mixed messages.

title: Trump downplays China's election meddling days after primetime address
shortDescription: President Trump downplayed China's meddling in U.S. elections, five days after he accused China of "the largest compromise of election data in history."

title: Trump news on Canada tariffs, Iran and the new White House statue
shortDescription: President Donald Trump said tariffs would go into effect for Canada next month. Iran strikes continue. The White House has a new garden sculpture.

title: Trump says Canada tariffs not wildfire-related
shortDescription: President Trump clarifies tariffs on Canada are unrelated to wildfires and criticizes Canadian leadership for tough treatment of U.S. farmers.

title: Key takeaways from Trump, Lebanon president meeting
shortDescription: President Donald Trump met with Lebanese President Joseph Aoun to discuss a range of topics that included U.S. action on Iran's nuclear sites.

title: Trump trade adviser loses criminal appeal tied to Jan. 6 Capitol riot
shortDescription: White House trade adviser Peter Navarro lost an appeal over his criminal conviction for defying a subpoena tied to the Capitol riot on Jan. 6, 2021.

title: More than 6,600 noncitizens were registered to vote in New Jersey
shortDescription: More than 6,600 non-U.S. citizens were registered to vote in New Jersey in 2023 and 2024 because of a software glitch, Gov. Mikie Sherrill said.
